candidate_functional_effect: logit reweighting at high-norm/'polar' tokens to correct for area inflation in dot-product attention, viewed as a planar projection of an underlying spherical similarity

results.judge_justification: Same functional effect: explicitly identifies that the natural manifold of PE is a portion of unit sphere and that planar PEs are suboptimal vs spherical ones — i.e. corrects the planar distortion the candidate names Mercator-like.

Native spherical attention integrates numerical quadrature weights — quadrature weighting on a sphere is exactly the cos(φ)-style area correction the candidate prescribes, applied inside the attention mechanism.
Applies vertical-angle (ϕ) encoded PE; corrects spherical distortion in vision but does not specifically reweight logits at high-norm tokens during inference.
Geometric Bayesian prior on attention; partially overlapping but not the cos-of-latitude area-correction the candidate names.
Spectral analysis of PE-attention coupling; different axis.
Broad blog survey; no specific cos-correction mechanism.
Wikipedia source-domain page; no LLM application.
